title: Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate
location: Online access for South African learners
salaryInsight: Entry-level data analyst roles in South Africa often range from R18,000 to R35,000 monthly; advanced SQL and dashboard skills can improve offers.
description: This programme introduces data cleaning, visualization and analysis using tools such as spreadsheets, SQL and Tableau. Learners complete practical case studies and build a portfolio suitable for junior analytics applications. It is useful for career changers and graduates aiming for business intelligence or data support roles.
requirements: Reliable internet access and a computer
Basic digital literacy and time-management discipline
applicationProcess: Register on Coursera, select the certificate track, and complete modules consistently each week. Build project outputs in a portfolio and update your CV once capstone work is complete.
tips: Complete capstone tasks with business context to stand out to employers.
Pair the course with Excel and SQL interview practice.

title: Digital Marketing Short Course
location: Cape Town campus and online options in South Africa
salaryInsight: Digital marketing upskilling can support transitions into roles averaging R20,000 to R40,000 monthly depending on specialization.
description: This short course covers paid media, social media strategy, email marketing, campaign analytics and content planning. It is designed for junior marketers, business owners and professionals transitioning into growth roles.
requirements: Grade 12 or equivalent is recommended
Comfort with digital tools and communication platforms
applicationProcess: Apply via the institution website, complete registration and payment steps, and attend orientation before coursework starts.
tips: Build a campaign portfolio while studying.
Track metrics from mock or real campaigns for your CV.

title: Project Management (PMP Prep)
location: Pretoria and online delivery in South Africa
salaryInsight: Project management certifications can increase competitiveness for coordinator and manager roles across construction, IT and operations.
description: This preparation course introduces PMI-aligned project management frameworks, risk planning and execution monitoring. Students practise exam-style questions and apply project templates for real workplace scenarios.
requirements: Basic project exposure is helpful
Strong reading and planning skills
applicationProcess: Register through UP Enterprises, confirm intake date and complete required pre-course materials before classes begin.
tips: Practice with timed mock exams weekly.
Relate PM concepts to your current work projects.

title: Coding Bootcamp – Full Stack Web Development
salaryInsight: Junior developer salaries in South Africa often start around R18,000 to R35,000 monthly and grow with portfolio quality and internship exposure.
description: The bootcamp covers HTML, CSS, JavaScript, backend development and deployment practices through project-based learning. Learners produce portfolio apps and receive career support in job search preparation.
requirements: Commitment to consistent study schedule
Laptop with ability to run development tools
applicationProcess: Complete the online readiness check, choose study pace and submit registration details. Start foundational modules, then progress to full-stack projects and capstone presentation.
tips: Push all projects to GitHub with clear README files.
Practice technical interviews before applying for junior roles.

title: Bookkeeping & Accounting Short Course
location: Johannesburg, Durban, Cape Town and online support
salaryInsight: Bookkeeping skills can open junior finance roles and freelance opportunities, especially for SMEs requiring monthly reconciliations.
description: This course introduces bookkeeping fundamentals, journals, reconciliations and entry-level accounting workflows used in small and medium businesses. It is suited to aspiring administrators and finance support staff.
requirements: Numeracy competence
Basic computer literacy
applicationProcess: Apply online or at a Damelin campus, confirm intake and complete registration documents and fee payment.
tips: Practice on sample transactions beyond class exercises.
Learn spreadsheet shortcuts to improve productivity.

title: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
institution: University of Cape Town Online High School / short learning units
salaryInsight: Cybersecurity entry roles such as SOC analyst and security support can offer competitive starting salaries, especially with practical labs and certifications.
description: Cybersecurity Fundamentals introduces core security principles, threat awareness, password policies, network basics and incident response concepts. It helps beginners build confidence before advanced certification tracks.
requirements: Basic computer and internet knowledge
Willingness to practise labs and security scenarios
applicationProcess: Register through the provider portal, access your learning dashboard and complete weekly modules plus assessments.
tips: Set up a basic home lab for hands-on practice.
Follow South African cybersecurity news to build context for interviews.

title: Graphic Design with Canva & Adobe
salaryInsight: Design freelancers and junior designers can increase earnings by combining portfolio quality with branding and social content skills.
description: This practical design course covers layout, typography, brand consistency and social media asset creation using Canva and Adobe tools. Learners build portfolio pieces suitable for freelance or junior design applications.
requirements: Creative interest and basic computer literacy
Access to design software or trial tools
applicationProcess: Complete registration online, attend onboarding and submit practical projects during each module.
tips: Build a niche portfolio (e.g., retail, education or NGO).
Learn to present design rationale, not only final artwork.

title: Supply Chain Management Short Course
location: Online and distance in South Africa
salaryInsight: Supply chain upskilling can lead to coordinator roles in logistics, procurement and warehousing with steady demand across provinces.
description: The course introduces procurement basics, inventory control, logistics planning and supplier performance concepts relevant to South African operations environments. It supports progression into entry-level supply chain roles.
requirements: Grade 12 recommended
Basic spreadsheet and communication skills
applicationProcess: Apply through the Unisa short learning programme process, submit required documents and follow registration instructions for your intake.
tips: Practice calculating stock turns and reorder points.
Understand real local logistics constraints when discussing case studies.

title: English for Business Communication
location: Major South African cities and online options
salaryInsight: Strong professional communication can improve hiring outcomes across customer-facing, administrative and management career paths.
description: This course strengthens email writing, presentations, meeting participation and business vocabulary for workplace communication. It is valuable for graduates and professionals preparing for interviews or promotions.
requirements: Basic English proficiency
Commitment to regular speaking and writing practice
applicationProcess: Choose a partner provider, complete placement assessment if required, then register and attend scheduled sessions.
tips: Record short speaking drills weekly to track improvement.
Use course exercises to build interview-ready answers.

title: Electric Vehicle Technician Course
salaryInsight: EV and advanced auto-electrical skills are growing niche areas in South Africa and may improve technician employability in future-focused workshops.
description: This programme introduces EV safety, battery systems, diagnostics and maintenance fundamentals for aspiring and current automotive technicians. Practical sessions focus on safe handling procedures and fault identification workflows.
requirements: Automotive background or technical aptitude recommended
Ability to attend practical sessions in person
applicationProcess: Submit an application form, proof of prior training/experience where applicable, and complete registration before intake closes.
tips: Revise electrical fundamentals before course start.
Document practical tasks completed for use in your CV and interviews.
